betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Conveyor Inserters & Ejectors§f

§aMove items between storage and conveyor belts automatically!§f

§bConveyor Ejectors§f take items from storage and place them onto conveyor belts. They have 9 filter slots with whitelist/blacklist support. Upgrade them with §bEjection Speed§f and §bStack Ejection§f upgrades up to level 3 for faster throughput.

§bConveyor Inserters§f take items from conveyor belts and output them into adjacent storage. They have 21 buffer slots and can destroy surplus items when the input buffer is full.

§6Crafting§f:
§b• Ejector§f: 4 iron ingots + pneumatic piston + conveyor belt → 2 ejectors
§b• Inserter§f: 6 iron ingots + 1 conveyor belt → 2 inserters

§6Filter System§f:
§b• Default§f: blacklist with no restrictions (everything passes)
§b• Add item§f: deposit into blue inventory square (not consumed)
§b• Toggle§f: click white arrow to switch whitelist/blacklist

§eTip§f: Use ejectors with blacklist mode to send specific items elsewhere, or whitelist mode to extract only what you need!
